    multimedia/gstreamer1-libav: unbreak with ffmpeg 5.0

    gstavdemux.c:486:26: error: no member named 'index_entries' in 'struct AVStream'
          fftarget = stream->index_entries[keyframeidx].timestamp;
                     ~~~~~~  ^

    PR:             261302
